judgeScores.justification: The organizational scheme demonstrates excellent judgment by applying context-appropriate categorization strategies—chronological nesting for personal photos, functional layers for code (frontend/backend), and business domains for spreadsheets—while maintaining consistent kebab-case naming throughout. The hierarchy achieves optimal balance with a maximum depth of three folder levels and equitable distribution of files (no folder contains more than 8 files). Minor weaknesses include the mixing of disparate script types (Python data pipelines with shell deployment scripts) within `data-and-scripts/` and inconsistent nesting for undated personal photos compared to dated ones, though these represent pragmatic trade-offs rather than significant flaws.
